string.name: cmd
string.value: SRCROOT=$$(dirname $(location configure)) echo $$SRCROOT pushd $$SRCROOT > /dev/null ./configure && make -C src ENABLE_SHARED=0 popd > /dev/null [ -f $$SRCROOT/src/liburing.a ] && cp $$SRCROOT/src/liburing.a $(location liburing.a) [ -f $$SRCROOT/src/include/liburing/compat.h ] && cp $$SRCROOT/src/include/liburing/compat.h $(location compat.h)
